positive: Minimalist retro-futuristic polaroid design featuring a stylized astronaut floating peacefully above a vibrant bioluminescent jungle canopy at sunset. The astronaut should be depicted as a clean, sleek silhouette against a gradient sky of deep indigo, tangerine, and electric teal. The jungle elements include oversized, abstract foliage and glowing abstract geometric patterns. Composition must be centered, offering strong contrast and clean lines suitable for a wearable print. Style: Pop Art meets Mid-Century Modern illustration. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal glow. Color palette: Limited, saturated colors (indigo, teal, orange).
